json.name: AcmeStore Retail — customers
json.description:
**purpose**: AcmeStore retail operational tables for the storefront data product.

**usage**: Joinable across customers / orders / products / inventory by their natural keys.

**limitations**: Operational copy; not a star schema. Refresh latency ~15 min.

editableSchemaFieldInfo.description: Display name as entered by the shopper.
ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for the billing address.

json.rawContract:
# Synthetic 4-table ODCS contract — fictional schema for DataHub fan-out test coverage. No upstream similarity.
apiVersion: v3.1.0
kind: DataContract
id: 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000003
name: AcmeStore Retail
version: 1.4.0
status: active
domain: retail
dataProduct: acme-storefront
tenant: acme
description:
  purpose: AcmeStore retail operational tables for the storefront data product.
  usage: Joinable across customers / orders / products / inventory by their natural keys.
  limitations: Operational copy; not a star schema. Refresh latency ~15 min.
tags:
  - retail
  - customer-data
team:
  - username: priya
    role: owner
servers:
  - server: prod-postgres
    type: postgres
    host: postgres.acme.internal
    port: 5432
    database: acmestore
    schema: public
schema:
  - name: customers
    physicalName: customers
    description: One row per registered AcmeStore shopper.
    properties:
      - name: customer_id
        physicalName: customer_id
        logicalType: number
        primaryKey: true
        required: true
        description: Surrogate key for the shopper.
      - name: email
        physicalName: email
        logicalType: string
        required: true
        tags:
          - pii
        classification: confidential
        description: Shopper's contact email.
      - name: full_name
        physicalName: full_name
        logicalType: string
        description: Display name as entered by the shopper.
      - name: signup_date
        physicalName: signup_date
        logicalType: date
        description: First account creation date.
      - name: country_code
        physicalName: country_code
        logicalType: string
        description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for the billing address.
  - name: orders
    physicalName: orders
    description: One row per checkout completion.
    properties:
      - name: order_id
        physicalName: order_id
        logicalType: number
        primaryKey: true
        required: true
      - name: customer_id
        physicalName: customer_id
        logicalType: number
        required: true
        description: Foreign key to customers.customer_id.
      - name: order_total
        physicalName: order_total
        logicalType: number
        required: true
        description: Order total in shopper currency, post-tax.
        quality:
          - name: order_total_non_negative
            rule: range
            mustBeGreaterOrEqualTo: 0
      - name: order_status
        physicalName: order_status
        logicalType: string
      - name: placed_at
        physicalName: placed_at
        logicalType: timestamp
  - name: products
    physicalName: products
    description: AcmeStore catalog rows.
    properties:
      - name: product_id
        physicalName: product_id
        logicalType: number
        primaryKey: true
        required: true
      - name: sku
        physicalName: sku
        logicalType: string
        required: true
        description: Vendor SKU; expected unique across the catalog.
        quality:
          - name: sku_unique
            rule: unique
      - name: title
        physicalName: title
        logicalType: string
      - name: price_cents
        physicalName: price_cents
        logicalType: number
      - name: category
        physicalName: category
        logicalType: string
  - name: inventory
    physicalName: inventory
    description: Per-SKU on-hand inventory snapshot.
    properties:
      - name: sku
        physicalName: sku
        logicalType: string
        required: true
      - name: warehouse_id
        physicalName: warehouse_id
        logicalType: string
        required: true
      - name: on_hand
        physicalName: on_hand
        logicalType: number
      - name: snapshot_at
        physicalName: snapshot_at
        logicalType: timestamp
